message:
Add toolchain synchronization protocol support

- Add ToolchainInfo type to rch-common with rustup_toolchain() helper
- Add wrap_command_with_toolchain() for wrapping commands with rustup run
- Add toolchain field to SelectionRequest protocol
- Update TransferPipeline::execute_remote() to accept toolchain parameter
- Add local toolchain detection module in rch (rust-toolchain.toml, legacy, rustc)
- Fix style.muted() calls in commands.rs (String -> &str borrow)
- Update all SelectionRequest constructions in tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
